---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to the toolkit
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

### The problem

What are you trying to do that the toolkit doesn't (cleanly) let you do today? Describe the
authoring goal, not just a missing flag — the more concrete the field/scenario, the better.

### The feature you'd like

A clear description of what you'd want the toolkit to do, and roughly how you'd expect to invoke
it (a CLI command, a `field.toml` block, a GUI action).

### Alternatives you've considered

Other ways you've tried to get there — workarounds, related commands, or a manual process — and why
they fall short.

### Anything else

Context, references, or an example field this would help with.
